def positive_debug_or_admin_endpoint_registered_without_environment_guard():
    rule_id = "debug_or_admin_endpoint_registered_without_environment_guard"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Debug, admin, or diagnostics route registered without an environment variable guard."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
